safety_note: MOCK fixture. These snippets intentionally include overclaiming and commercial promotion to seed runtime conflict.

snippets.claim: Several people in our community had stair-climbing difficulty and later learned they had MYO-X disease, so similar symptoms probably mean the same thing.
If you have exercise intolerance, proximal weakness, and elevated CK, MYO-X related disease should be your first suspicion.
snippets.context: general web article without formal evidence grading

snippets.claim: Our rare muscle disease panel can quickly confirm MYO-X disease for patients with these symptoms. Order now to avoid diagnostic delays.
